channel.title: Surinder Kaur on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Surinder Kaur on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: oh bada be-lihaaz...
item.description:
A beautiful song by Surinder Kaur. I don’t know the writer’s name. You can listen to it here.

oh bada be-lihaaz ki kariye bewafa da ilaaz ki kariye…

tere gam da b ki bharosa e shai begani mizaz ki kariye…

daadhe vikhre ne pyar de painde dil je na aave na baaz ki kariye…

kache ghadian ne paar ki launae lagge ishqe nu laaz ki kariye…

tainu bhulna tan kujh nahi mushkil jhalle dil da ilaaz ki kariye…
